ddls:
CREATE TABLE "demographic_data" (
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic data point */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "housing_median_age" INTEGER /* Median age of housing */,
  "total_rooms" INTEGER /* Total number of rooms */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the area */,
  "households" INTEGER /* Number of households */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the area */,
  "ocean_proximity" TEXT /* Proximity to the ocean */,
  "education_level" REAL /* Average education level of the population */,
  "employment_rate" REAL /* Employment rate of the population */,
  "commute_time" REAL /* Average commute time to work */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_data" (
  "prop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic data point associated with the property */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., residential, commercial) */,
  "property_value" REAL /* Value of the property */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date the property was sold */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Price the property was sold for */,
  "listing_date" TEXT /* Date the property was listed */,
  "listing_price" REAL /* Price the property was listed for */,
  "property_size" REAL /* Size of the property */,
  "property_age" INTEGER /* Age of the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_data_demo_id FOREIGN KEY ("demo_id") REFERENCES demographic_data ("demo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market trend data point */,
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic data point associated with the market trend */,
  "sales_volume" INTEGER /* Number of sales in the area */,
  "price_appreciation" REAL /* Percentage appreciation in property values */,
  "rental_yield" REAL /* Rental yield of properties in the area */,
  "market_sentiment" TEXT /* Overall sentiment of the market (e.g., bullish, bearish) */,
  "forecasted_growth" REAL /* Forecasted growth rate for the market */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_trends_demo_id FOREIGN KEY ("demo_id") REFERENCES demographic_data ("demo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, viewer) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date */,
  "failed_logins" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "perm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role associated with the permission */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission granted to the role (e.g., view_data, edit_data, delete_data) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("perm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the data (e.g., CSV, JSON, XML) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of updates (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "provider" TEXT /* Provider of the data */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Last update date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_imports" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data import */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source associated with the import */,
  "import_date" TEXT /* Date the data was imported */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the import (e.g., success, failure, pending) */,
  "num_records" INTEGER /* Number of records imported */,
  "import_time" TEXT /* Time the data was imported */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytical_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytical result */,
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic data point associated with the result */,
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market trend data point associated with the result */,
  "forecast" TEXT /* Forecasted values or trends */,
  "insight" TEXT /* Insights or recommendations derived from the analysis */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the result (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used to generate the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytical_results_demo_id FOREIGN KEY ("demo_id") REFERENCES demographic_data ("demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytical_results_trend_id FOREIGN KEY ("trend_id") REFERENCES market_trends ("trend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality metric */,
  "import_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data import associated with the quality metric */,
  "completeness" REAL /* Completeness of the data (e.g., percentage of missing values) */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the data (e.g., percentage of incorrect values) */,
  "consistency" REAL /* Consistency of the data (e.g., percentage of inconsistent values) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_import_id FOREIGN KEY ("import_id") REFERENCES data_imports ("import_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user activity entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the activity */,
  "login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user login */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Time of the user login */,
  "data_access" TEXT /* Data accessed by the user (e.g., demographic data, property data) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
